integrityDialog.title: Before we start
integrityDialog.body: To help Yubi adapt learning for you, it is important to answer honestly according to what really feels true for you.
integrityDialog.scope: The questionnaire has {questions} questions across {parts} short parts.
integrityDialog.respect: You can say that something is hard, confusing, or that you do not feel like continuing right now — just keep the language respectful with Yubi.
integrityDialog.ai: Yubi is a learning AI tool. It uses your answers to help you, not to judge you.
intro.2: I’m Yubi, and I’m here to get to know you a little better
intro.3: In a moment we’ll go through a few short questions that help me understand how you learn best:
intro.4: What interests you, what helps you, and how you feel while learning.
intro.5: There are no right or wrong answers — just answer what feels true for you.
intro.6: Ready? It will only take a few minutes
section.0: Let’s start! Tell me a little about what interests you in learning
section.1: Great. Now I want to hear how you handle challenges
section.2: Nice. Now we’ll talk about responsibility, initiative, and planning
section.3: Good. Now we’ll check how you pause, plan, and calm yourself when needed
section.4: Almost there. A few questions about what you know about yourself as a learner
section.5: Last part: your environment, support, and computer learning
question.microcopy: There are no right or wrong answers — choose what fits you best
complete.title: {studentName}, I got to know you a little better
complete.subtitle: I’ll use your answers to adapt tasks, explanations, and support for you later.

fallback.summary: Thanks for your answers! Is there anything else important you want me to know?
fallback.chat: Thanks for sharing! I wrote that down. Is there anything else you want to tell me?
reflect.opener.deep.mixed: It sounds like you're more comfortable with {strength}, and less with {difficulty}. Let's take a look together.
reflect.opener.deep.difficulty: It sounds like {difficulty} is what's least comfortable for you right now. Let's understand what's going on there.
reflect.opener.deep.strength: It sounds like {strength} is a real strength and comfort for you. Nice — let's keep going.
reflect.opener.deep.neutral: Thanks for sharing! Let's keep getting to know how you like to learn.

reflect.q.resp_action.opt.3: Try first, then ask for help

reflect.q.reg_action.opt.2: Plan how much time to use
reflect.q.reg_action.opt.3: Decide how I will check understanding

reflect.q.aware_action.prompt: What could help you discover what really works for your learning?
reflect.q.aware_action.opt.0: Pause and think at the end
reflect.q.aware_action.opt.1: Write down one thing that helped
reflect.q.env_bored.prompt: What helps you most when you're bored in class?
reflect.q.env_support.prompt: When it's hard, who helps you most?
reflect.q.env_focus.prompt: What makes it hardest to focus in lessons?
reflect.q.env_computer.prompt: What helps you most when learning with a computer?
reflect.q.env_computer.opt.2: When it feels like a game
reflect.q.env_diff.prompt: What most affects your focus and comfort in lessons?
reflect.q.env_action.prompt: What small change could help you feel more comfortable and focused?
reflect.q.env_action.opt.2: Ask for help at the right time
reflect.q.env_action.opt.3: Set up the computer before starting

landing.faq.title: Frequently asked questions
landing.faq.subtitle: A few common questions about the platform
landing.faq.q1.q: What is Yuvi Spark and what is it for?
landing.faq.q1.a: Yuvi Spark is an AI-powered personalized learning platform built for the Ministry of Education's 720 program. It maps each student's learning path and adapts content, pace, and difficulty accordingly, alongside a smart learning companion and a clear picture for the teaching staff.
landing.faq.q2.q: How does learning actually work in Yuvi Spark?
landing.faq.q2.a: The journey starts with a short learner mapping process that identifies strengths, interests, and learning preferences. As learning continues, the system adjusts content and pace based on progress, and gives the student encouraging, non-numeric feedback. At the same time, the teacher receives clear insights into the class's progress.
landing.faq.q3.q: How does the AI work in the system?
landing.faq.q3.a: The smart learning agent accompanies the student along the way, responds in the selected language (Hebrew, Arabic, or English), and helps explain material - without replacing the teacher. The AI never receives identifying student details, and every insight shown to a teacher comes with an explanation and the underlying data, to keep things fully transparent.
landing.faq.q4.q: What data and privacy protections are in place?
landing.faq.q4.a: Yuvi Spark shares only general learning-profile details with the AI engine, never personally identifying information. All learning data, language preference, and progress are stored securely, and students are always told when they are using an AI tool.
landing.faq.q5.q: What happens if a student struggles or falls behind?
landing.faq.q5.a: When the system detects difficulty or a slower pace, it shows the teacher a clear insight along with the reasoning behind it - not just a score. The teacher decides how to respond: reinforcing a topic, adjusting a task, or having a personal check-in with the student.
landing.faq.q6.q: Who can use Yuvi Spark and how do schools join?
landing.faq.q6.a: The platform is intended for students, teachers, and pedagogical staff at schools participating in the 720 program. Joining and rollout are coordinated with the school's staff according to Ministry of Education guidelines, so it fits the specific needs of each class and student.
landing.contact.title: Contact us
landing.contact.subtitle: Have a question or want to hear more about the platform? Write to us and we'll get back to you soon.
landing.contact.success: Thanks! We received your message and will get back to you soon.

landing.hub.title: A team of AI agents, one shared brain
landing.hub.subtitle: Behind Spark runs a central AI engine that connects smart agents, analyzes each student's situation, and tailors personal support in real time.

landing.hub.summary: All the agents work together around the student — with shared context, continuous support and clear insights for the education team.

sdash.skills.title: My activeness skills
sdash.skills.subtitle: The skills that power your learning — they grow with you every day.
sdash.skills.helpBody: These are the skills that help you learn on your own — to persist, plan, self-regulate, and believe you can grow. They grow with you as you practice.
sdash.skills.radar.aria: Your skills map. Move between skills with Tab or the arrow keys to hear details about each one.
sdash.skills.weekly.whyFallback: We chose to focus on {skill} this week because it's the skill that will help you move forward most right now.
sdash.skills.weekly.missionFallback: Try to complete two activities in a row this week, even if they feel challenging.
sdash.skill.motivation_relevance.note: You connect to learning when it feels meaningful to you.
sdash.skill.motivation_relevance.tip: It's easier to keep going when a task connects to what interests you.
sdash.skill.motivation_relevance.why: We chose to focus on motivation because we noticed it's easier for you to persist when a task connects to what you love.
sdash.skill.motivation_relevance.mission: Pick one activity this week that connects to a topic you love, and finish it to the end.
sdash.skill.growth_mindset.note: You understand that mistakes are an important part of learning.
sdash.skill.growth_mindset.tip: A mistake is a chance to learn something new, not a sign of failure.
sdash.skill.growth_mindset.why: We chose to focus on a growth mindset because we noticed it can be hard for you to keep going after a mistake.
sdash.skill.growth_mindset.mission: When you make a mistake this week, write one sentence about what you learned and carry on.
sdash.skill.initiative_responsibility.no: You know how to take charge of your next learning step.
sdash.skill.initiative_responsibility.ti: You can start on your own without waiting for a prompt.
sdash.skill.initiative_responsibility.wh: We chose to focus on initiative because it seems you sometimes wait for guidance before starting.
sdash.skill.initiative_responsibility.mi: Start a new activity on your own this week, without waiting for a reminder.
sdash.skill.self_regulation.note: You manage the time and pace of your learning well.
sdash.skill.self_regulation.tip: Staying focused through a whole task helps you move forward.
sdash.skill.self_regulation.why: We chose to focus on self-regulation because we noticed it can be hard to stay focused through a whole task.
sdash.skill.self_regulation.mission: Find a quiet corner and complete one activity in a row, without interruptions.
sdash.skill.self_awareness.note: You know your strengths and what challenges you.
sdash.skill.self_awareness.tip: Noticing when to ask for help supports your learning.
sdash.skill.self_awareness.why: We chose to focus on self-awareness so you can better recognize when it's worth asking for help.
sdash.skill.self_awareness.mission: After each activity this week, note how you felt and what was easy or hard.
sdash.skill.support_emotional.note: You know how to ask for help and lean on those around you.
sdash.skill.support_emotional.tip: Asking for help in a hard moment is part of smart learning.
sdash.skill.support_emotional.why: We chose to focus on the emotional side so learning feels more pleasant and safe for you.
sdash.skill.support_emotional.mission: When something feels hard this week, ask Yuvi or your teacher for help instead of giving up.

actmap.yubi.outro: Every area you choose to grow moves you forward. I'm right here with you.

actmap.yubi.strong.collaboration: You work well with others and add to the group.

actmap.yubi.strong.reflection: You stop to think about how you learned and what worked.
actmap.yubi.strong.decision_making: You choose how to move forward from several options.
actmap.yubi.grow.persistence: Try noticing when to pause and try a different way.
actmap.yubi.grow.autonomy: Try making a few more small decisions before asking for help.
actmap.yubi.grow.initiative: Turn one idea into a real action this week.
actmap.yubi.grow.collaboration: Take a clearer role in group work.
actmap.yubi.grow.learning_management: Plan the order of your work before you start.
actmap.yubi.grow.reflection: Draw one conclusion from each task and try it again.
actmap.yubi.grow.decision_making: Weigh a pro and a con before you decide.
learning.catalog.title: Choose your next step
learning.catalog.subtitle: Approved activities connected to your path. Choose a topic and work at a pace that suits you.
learning.filters.label: Filter learning activities
learning.filters.subject: Filter by subject
learning.search.label: Search activities
learning.search.placeholder: Search for a topic or activity
learning.loading.title: Loading learning activities…
learning.loading.body: Connecting to the approved content provider.
learning.error.title: Could not load the activities
learning.error.body: The content provider is currently unavailable. Try again in a moment.
learning.empty.title: No matching activities found
learning.empty.body: Change the filter or search text.
learning.language.fallback: This activity is not available in your selected language yet, so the provider content will be shown in Hebrew.
learning.roadmap.label: Learning journey: {title}
learning.roadmap.worldHint: Choose an open waypoint to continue your journey
learning.aiDisclosure: Yubi is an AI-based learning tool, and activity is reported to the system without identifying details.
learning.world.subtitle.math: Discover ideas, revisit previous waypoints, and move forward along your path.
learning.world.subtitle.science: Move between discovery stations and continue at a pace that suits you.
learning.world.subtitle.other: Choose a waypoint and continue along your personal path.
learning.world.canvasAria: A 2D learning world for {subject}. Walk with Yubi and choose buildings; every waypoint is also available in the journey list.
learning.world.navigationHelp: Click the map or use arrow keys to move · scroll to zoom
learning.world.journey.title: My journey
learning.world.journey.body: Revisit a completed waypoint, choose an open one, or see what will become available later.
learning.world.blocked.body: This waypoint is not open yet. Yubi can show you the step that is available now.
learning.world.fallback.aria: Accessible low-power view of the learning world
learning.world.fallback.body: The low-power view is active. Every waypoint and activity remains available.
learning.world.announcement.blocked: Waypoint {title} will open later. Choose the step that is available now.
learning.world.announcement.recommended: The next available step is now highlighted.
learning.world.bridgeLocked: The bridge opens after finishing every stop on the island
learning.lesson.elapsed.one: Elapsed time measured between events: about one minute
learning.lesson.elapsed: Elapsed time measured between events: about {minutes} minutes
learning.lesson.loading.body: Validating the activity and creating a secure reporting connection.
learning.lesson.error.body: Your information is safe. Try again or choose another activity.
learning.lesson.frameError: The activity did not finish loading
learning.lesson.frameError.body: The content-provider connection was delayed or interrupted. Create a fresh secure connection and try again.
learning.lesson.reporting: Progress and answers are saved through xAPI
learning.lesson.completed.body: Your progress was saved. You can choose the next step.
learning.lesson.completionDialog.progres: Yuvi is travelling to the next station — Continue unlocks when the journey ends
learning.lesson.yuviMoves: Yuvi moves forward with you, one step at a time
yubiStudio.title: Yubi Studio
yubiStudio.subtitle: Design Yubi — pick items, colors and look
yubiStudio.hint: Click me to change how I look! ✨
yubiStudio.reward.title: New item unlocked!
yubiStudio.reward.body: Yubi earned a new {item} for the design studio
